title: Basic Greetings
description: Learn to say hello, goodbye, and basic courtesies
objective: Master common greeting phrases and responses

title: Introducing Yourself
description: Learn how to introduce yourself and ask for names
objective: Introduce yourself and ask others their names

title: Polite Expressions
description: Learn essential polite phrases like please, thank you, and excuse me
objective: Use courtesy expressions naturally in conversation

title: Numbers 0-20
description: Learn to count and recognize basic numbers
objective: Confidently count from 0 to 20 in Spanish

title: Colors & Descriptions
description: Learn color names and basic color descriptions
objective: Name common colors and use them in simple sentences

title: Numbers 21-100
description: Extend your number knowledge into the tens and hundreds
objective: Count to 100 and perform simple arithmetic in Spanish

title: Family Members
description: Learn names for immediate and extended family members
objective: Identify and name family members in Spanish

title: Describing People
description: Learn adjectives to describe physical appearance and personality
objective: Describe people using basic adjectives

title: Possessive Pronouns
description: Learn how to express ownership using possessives
objective: Use mi, tu, su, nuestro correctly in sentences

title: Food Vocabulary
description: Learn names for common foods and ingredients
objective: Identify and name everyday food items in Spanish

title: Ordering at a Café
description: Learn phrases to order food and drinks at a café or restaurant
objective: Place a basic food and drink order in Spanish

title: Meals & Drinks
description: Learn vocabulary for mealtimes, drinks, and common dishes
objective: Discuss meals and beverages using Spanish vocabulary

title: Morning Routine
description: Learn reflexive verbs to describe daily morning activities
objective: Describe a morning routine using reflexive verbs

title: Time Expressions
description: Learn to tell the time and use time expressions
objective: Tell the time and schedule activities in Spanish

title: Weekly Activities
description: Discuss activities you do on different days of the week
objective: Talk about weekly habits and recurring activities

title: At the Market
description: Learn vocabulary for shopping and asking about prices
objective: Ask for prices and make purchases at a market

title: Clothing Vocabulary
description: Learn names for clothing items and how to describe them
objective: Name clothing items and describe their colors and styles

title: Making Purchases
description: Learn to pay, ask for a receipt, and handle transactions
objective: Complete a purchase transaction in Spanish

title: Describing the Weather
description: Learn expressions for common weather conditions
objective: Describe current and future weather in Spanish

title: Seasons & Months
description: Learn the four seasons, months, and seasonal activities
objective: Name seasons, months, and associated activities

title: Weather Forecasts
description: Understand and discuss weather forecasts and climate
objective: Interpret and describe weather forecasts in Spanish

title: Getting Around Town
description: Learn vocabulary for transport options in a city
objective: Name transport options and describe how to get somewhere

title: Asking for Directions
description: Learn to ask and give directions using spatial vocabulary
objective: Ask for and understand basic directions in Spanish

title: Buying Tickets
description: Learn vocabulary for purchasing transport tickets and reading schedules
objective: Buy a ticket and navigate a transport schedule

title: Job Descriptions
description: Learn vocabulary for professions and workplace environments
objective: Describe different jobs and their responsibilities

title: Workplace Conversations
description: Practice common workplace interactions and professional vocabulary
objective: Communicate professionally in a workplace setting

title: Job Applications
description: Learn language for writing a CV and preparing for interviews
objective: Discuss work experience and apply for a job in Spanish

title: Planning a Trip
description: Learn vocabulary for researching destinations and making travel plans
objective: Plan a trip and discuss travel preferences

title: At the Hotel
description: Learn to check in, describe preferences, and handle hotel stays
objective: Check in and communicate needs at a hotel

title: Sightseeing & Tourism
description: Discuss tourist attractions, guided tours, and cultural sites
objective: Discuss sightseeing plans and ask about tourist attractions

title: Body Parts
description: Learn vocabulary for all major body parts and anatomy
objective: Name body parts and use them in context

title: At the Doctor's
description: Learn to describe symptoms and understand medical advice
objective: Describe symptoms and understand a doctor's instructions

title: Healthy Habits
description: Discuss exercise, diet, sleep, and wellbeing in Spanish
objective: Talk about healthy lifestyle choices and habits

title: Sports & Activities
description: Learn vocabulary for popular sports and physical activities
objective: Talk about sports preferences and physical activities

title: Expressing Preferences
description: Learn to express likes, dislikes, and preferences in detail
objective: Express and justify personal preferences fluently

title: Making Plans
description: Learn to propose, accept, and decline plans with friends
objective: Arrange plans and respond to invitations in Spanish

title: Reading the News
description: Analyze newspaper headlines and understand journalistic style
objective: Interpret news articles and identify key information

title: Expressing Opinions
description: Learn sophisticated phrases for stating, qualifying, and defending opinions
objective: Express and defend complex opinions fluently

title: Social Media & Technology
description: Discuss technology, social media trends, and digital culture
objective: Discuss technology and media in contemporary Spanish

title: Social Issues
description: Discuss inequality, poverty, discrimination, and social challenges
objective: Engage with complex social topics in Spanish

title: Cultural Traditions
description: Explore Hispanic festivals, traditions, and cultural identity
objective: Discuss and compare cultural traditions across Spanish-speaking countries

title: Comparing Perspectives
description: Learn discourse markers and structures for balanced argument
objective: Present multiple perspectives using complex linking language

title: Environmental Problems
description: Discuss pollution, climate change, and environmental degradation
objective: Discuss major environmental issues using appropriate vocabulary

title: Conservation & Sustainability
description: Explore recycling, renewable energy, and sustainable practices
objective: Discuss conservation measures and sustainable solutions

title: Nature & Ecosystems
description: Discuss forests, oceans, biodiversity, and natural habitats
objective: Describe ecosystems and the importance of biodiversity

title: Business Negotiations
description: Master language for negotiating contracts, deals, and agreements
objective: Conduct a professional negotiation in Spanish

title: Economic Concepts
description: Understand and discuss macroeconomic and financial concepts
objective: Discuss economic phenomena using precise Spanish terminology

title: Professional Writing
description: Write formal reports, proposals, and business correspondence
objective: Produce formal written documents in professional Spanish

title: Spanish Literature
description: Engage with canonical works from Cervantes, García Lorca, and Neruda
objective: Analyze literary texts and discuss themes, style, and context

title: Film & Art Criticism
description: Learn language for critiquing cinema, visual arts, and cultural works
objective: Write and discuss critical reviews in fluent Spanish

title: Cultural Analysis
description: Analyze historical influence, cultural legacy, and artistic movements
objective: Contextualize cultural phenomena in historical and social frameworks

title: Constructing Arguments
description: Master techniques for building coherent thesis-driven arguments
objective: Construct and present a well-structured argument in Spanish

title: Nuanced Expression
description: Learn to convey subtlety, irony, understatement, and implication
objective: Express nuanced meaning with precision and sophistication

title: Academic Language
description: Master academic register for essays, papers, and formal discourse
objective: Produce and comprehend academic Spanish texts

title: Advanced Rhetoric
description: Study rhetorical devices: metaphor, alliteration, irony, and hyperbole
objective: Identify and deploy rhetorical devices in Spanish discourse

title: Formal Register
description: Master the most elevated, ceremonial, and legal Spanish registers
objective: Produce formally impeccable Spanish in high-stakes contexts

title: Speechwriting & Oratory
description: Learn the craft of writing and delivering speeches in Spanish
objective: Write and deliver a compelling speech in Spanish

title: Spanish Idioms
description: Master idiomatic expressions used by native Spanish speakers
objective: Understand and use idiomatic Spanish naturally in context

title: Regional Expressions
description: Explore dialect variation across Spain and Latin America
objective: Recognize and use regional vocabulary from multiple Spanish-speaking countries

title: Proverbs & Sayings
description: Learn traditional Spanish proverbs, refranes, and folk wisdom
objective: Use proverbs and sayings appropriately in conversation
